programmes.show_description: Amazingly, every one of these 23 top tunes only spent seven days at the top of the UK chart during the 1980s - even big songs by superstars like Madonna, Kylie, Blondie and U2!

programmes.show_name: All Day - Every Song A No.1!
programmes.show_description: A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!
The Pat-man is back with another Sharp selection of classic '80s number 1 hits - from Enya and Europe to The Bangles and Billy Ocean.
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
Ten fabulous videos from the UK Queen of '80s Pop - Kim Wilde! Including six top 10s and her duet with Junior.
From the decade that invented the power ballad - non-stop love songs, back to back.
Indulge yourself with 12 of Kate's most sensual songs of the late '70s and '80s - from Wuthering Heights to This Woman's Work.

Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1981!
Sixty minutes of lesser heard hits from 1981. Including the Pretenders, Spandau Ballet, George Harrison, Toyah and the Pointer Sisters.
